Matt has created two functional nutrition categories from scratch. Wonderade is the third — with a larger TAM than either previous category at launch, an ingredient tech breakthrough that just unlocked the taste barrier, and the same millennial buyer, now raising children.

02 — The Problem

The Problem

Convenient juice is just sugar water. No matter the brand.

The Sugar Water Category

Capri Sun. Honest Kids. Mott's. Juicy Juice.

11–15g sugar, 0g protein, 0g fiber. No matter which brand a parent reaches for, they're handing their kid sugar water dressed up in a fun package.

0.4 cm / year

That's how much additional height a child gains annually from adequate protein intake. In 1900, Americans were taller than Danes. By 1960, Danes were taller — researchers attribute the reversal largely to Denmark's dramatic increase in milk and protein consumption. Protein drives bone density, muscle development, and cognitive function throughout childhood.

11–15g sugar
per serving, leading juice brands
0g protein
in any major kids juice brand
9 in 10 kids
don't hit daily potassium needs

04 — Why Now

Three triggers.
Not trends.

Three specific market events created this exact moment — not slow trends, actual triggers.

01
The Olipop for juice doesn't exist yet.
$18.8B
The U.S. kids beverage market is dominated by Capri Sun and Juicy Juice — brands with no functional benefit. Olipop hit $400M+ revenue in 2024; Poppi acquired by PepsiCo for $1.95B in March 2025. The adult version is won. The kids version is wide open.
02
Millennial Parents Already Proved They Pay for Functional
$1.95B
Poppi acquired by PepsiCo March 2025. Magic Spoon raised $85M Series B in April 2024. The generation now raising kids has proven it will pay a premium for functional. Same buyer psychology. Same willingness to pay. Now they have kids.
03
Ingredient Technology Just Unlocked the Category
Oct 2025
The technology existed earlier — but it didn't taste good enough for kids until fall 2025. New micro/ultrafiltration processing now delivers high-protein in a clear, juice-format beverage with zero chalkiness. Wonderade uses pea protein isolate processed via this generation of tech — 8g protein in a carton that kids actually want to drink.

Sources: Bloomberg/Food Dive; PepsiCo press release; TechCrunch; Glanbia Nutritionals millennial parent survey

07b — Business Model

Retail Unit Economics

Two SKUs. One shelf strategy.

Single · 8.25 fl oz carton
$2.99
MSRP per unit
Retailer Margin −40% → retailer pays $1.79
Distributor Spread −$0.29
Brand Sell-In ★ $1.50
Broker 3.5% of sell-in −$0.05
Trade Spend 10% of sell-in −$0.15
Freight / Logistics 6% of sell-in −$0.09
COGS launch est. −$0.76
Brand Contribution Margin $0.45  30% of sell-in
4-Pack · 4 × 8.25 fl oz
$9.99
MSRP · $2.50/unit implied
Retailer Margin −40% → retailer pays $5.99
Distributor Spread −$0.49
Brand Sell-In ★ $5.50
Broker 3.5% of sell-in −$0.19
Trade Spend 10% of sell-in −$0.55
Freight / Logistics 6% of sell-in −$0.33
COGS 4 × $0.76 −$3.04
Brand Contribution Margin $1.39  25% of sell-in

Single earns 30% CM of brand sell-in — stronger margin rate. 4-Pack earns 3.1× the absolute dollar CM per transaction ($1.39 vs. $0.45) — higher basket value for retailers and lower CAC per household acquired. COGS est. $0.76/unit at launch (550K units); targets $0.60 at scale (10M units/yr).
★ Brand sell-in = what the brand actually receives. All % deductions calculated from this figure.
Direct-to-retailer bypasses distributor spread, improving CM to ~38%+ of sell-in.

$1.50
Brand sell-in · Single
$5.50
Brand sell-in · 4-Pack
25–30%
CM of brand sell-in
07c — Business Model

The Retail Playbook

Natural first. Then mass. Then everywhere.

Tier 1 · Year 1 · Natural & Specialty
Wegmans, regional natural grocers, and independent specialty retailers
Health-forward shoppers willing to trial new brands — highest velocity in functional beverage. Goal: prove 3–4 turns/week, build brand credibility, earn the case study needed for the mass pitch. Best margin tier with less promotional pressure.
Tier 2 · Year 2 · Mass & Club
Target · Walmart · Costco · Sam's Club
Volume multiplier once 6–12 months of natural channel velocity data is in hand. Goal: 1,000+ doors, driving awareness at scale. Lower per-unit CM — higher absolute dollar contribution per week.
Tier 3 · Year 2–3 · Convenience & Impulse
7-Eleven · Wawa · Airport / Travel · Gym / Fitness
Premium impulse channel — single-unit $2.99 MSRP plays well for on-the-go trial. Goal: trial acquisition and brand ubiquity. Highest per-unit price point; low broker dependency in most sub-channels.
Broker Strategy

"3.5% broker fee unlocks all three tiers without a field sales team. We're building relationships with UNFI, KeHE, and regional distributors to cover natural and mass simultaneously — leverage before overhead."

500
Natural doors
by Month 9
2,500
Doors Year 2
natural + mass
5,000+
Doors Year 3
target
08 — Go-to-Market

Seed → Flywheel
→ Retail & Scale

Informed by Soylent (DTC-first) and Kin Euphorics (creator-seeding) playbooks proven by founder Matt Cauble.

Phase 1 · Months 1–3
Seed + Broker Outreach
10K+ units seeded
Gift 10,000+ units to parent creators on Instagram & TikTok. Authentic unboxing + kid reaction videos — no scripts. Goal: 500+ UGC pieces before first paid ad. Simultaneous broker outreach targets Fall 2026 shelf: Sprouts, Erewhon, HEB, Fresh Market, Wegmans (400 stores Q4 2026).
Phase 2 · Months 3–9
Ignite the Flywheel
$500K first revenue
Best-performing UGC → paid Meta/TikTok creatives. Algorithm-organic pickup drives DTC subscription traffic. Build email/SMS retention list from early subscribers. Retail pilot generates real-time sell-through data for Series A deck.
Phase 3 · Month 9+
Scale & Expand
1,800 stores by 2027
Q1 2027 Series A: $15.7M revenue trajectory + 25K subscribers + 1,800-store proof. Full regional rollout via distributor + broker. Begin Whole Foods, Target national conversations. New flavors (SKU 3) + influencer affiliate program. Costco pilot H2 2027.

MILESTONES THIS ROUND UNLOCKS

1
Production Launch — 550K unit inventory run. Establishes supply chain & co-packer relationship.
2
Creator Seeding Campaign — 10K+ units gifted → 500+ authentic UGC videos → social proof corpus for paid media.
3
First $500K Revenue — Validates DTC subscription conversion rate, retention, and payback period.
4
First 500 Stores Placement — Retail velocity data across 500 doors establishes sell-through proof for chain-wide expansion.
5
Series A Readiness — 12-month cohort data → CAC/LTV/churn proof → institutional round.
